name: RPlog_The_Burial_of_Gavin_Shai
title: The Burial of Gavin Shai
summary: The Twi'lek enforcer Tyy'sun Eson pilots the freighter Trader's Envy through a violent thunderstorm to a remote jetty on Trandosha, his captive Gavin Shai bound aboard. There Tyy'sun reveals a freshly dug grave site tended by droids and explains that the only way out of the Black Sun syndicate is through death. Gavin makes a futile escape attempt, is subdued by his shock restraints, and is dragged into a transparisteel coffin at the bottom of the pit. Rather than killing him outright, Tyy'sun condemns Gavin to be buried alive, the coffin fitted with an air supply so he will experience death slowly. When Gavin asks Tyy'sun to tell Petra Doom that he loved her, the Twi'lek coldly answers "tell her yourself" and seals the lid. The site is rigged with a hidden beacon and camera, broadcasting a 50,000-credit bounty for whoever recovers Gavin before his life is terminated.
